form.formComment: In the money last time at Warrnambool (26.13) in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win, finishing a 3.5 lengths third. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from four starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 450m at Warrnambool beaten 2 lengths (26.05) behind Ultra Pub Run in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 6. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (23.03) behind Harper Spiller in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 4. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth over 390m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (23.03) behind Harper Spiller in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 4. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked and lost ground on first turn.
Quick to begin; Faltered in back straight and tailed off.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Bendigo to win by 0.8 lengths in 24.22, beating Ice Candy. Last start finished last on April 3 over 460m at Geelong behind Trissa Bale beaten 4.5 lengths (26.34) in a Mix 6/7. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 450m at this track clocking 26.24. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by one length at this track (22.56) beating Scroll Up in a Maiden on March 23. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won easily by 5.5 lengths at Healesville (19.59) beating Red River Rogue in a Grade 7 on March 15. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 2 over 425m at Bendigo behind Bronelly Timmy beaten 7 lengths (24.80) in a T3 RSTW. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 425m at Bendigo. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.
